name: @tsugite/desktop
description: Tsugite local video workflow desktop application
author: Azumi Musuhi

scripts.start: npm --prefix ../.. run build && npm --prefix ../workflow-viewer run build && electron .
scripts.build:runtime: node scripts/clean-generated.mjs && npm --prefix ../.. run build && npm --prefix ../workflow-viewer run build && npm run prepare-runtime -- --install
scripts.package: npm run build:runtime && electron-forge package && npm run package:audit
scripts.make: npm run build:runtime && electron-forge make && npm run package:audit
